title: Set Up Liveblocks Real-Time Collaboration in Next.js
summary: Full Liveblocks integration — room setup, presence (live cursors), storage (shared state), Liveblocks + Tiptap collaborative editor, and auth endpoint.
declaration: I will integrate Liveblocks into this Next.js project for real-time multiplayer features. This covers installing packages, configuring the Liveblocks client, setting up presence (live cursors/awareness), shared storage, and a secure auth endpoint. I will NOT use raw WebSocket, Socket.io, or Supabase Realtime for this. If you only need server-sent events or one-way streaming, Liveblocks is overkill — say so and I'll recommend a simpler approach.
